reviews.review_description: Purchased it yesterday and found that the table is located on a height which makes it impossible to play

developer_response.body: Hi , if you press the sticks of your controller you can change the highness. There is also a setting to modify the player high

reviews.review_description: This is so fun to play! The physics are really solid - it feels much more like playing actual air hockey than I expected it to. The user interface is pretty rough, so it gives a bad first impression, but if you ignore that and just actually play the game it is a stellar experience. It's surprisingly hard to find a good VR air hockey game! Highly recommend this one.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much,for sure we will improve the UI in the near future,thanks again for playing the game

reviews.review_description:
This game has a lot of potential, once a few bugs are fixed it'll be excellent. The physics of it are convincing so it feels like playing real air hockey. I love that it has a mixed reality mode on my Quest 3 so it feels like the air hockey table is in my room!
A few tips - for menus I had to hold the 'A' button to make the pointer appear and then press the trigger to select. In mixed reality mode you can move the table with the 2 joysticks and clicking the joysticks moves the table up and down.
Keep up the good work, thank you!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much meshuggahlad,we are doing our best to create the best air hockey game possibile

reviews.review_description: I purchased this game hoping to play air hockey, but the second I went into the game I was stuck on the first page when I have to choose a public nickname. My controllers did not show up at all, making it unable for me to play. I tried resetting my oculus twice and nothing worked. Don’t recommend.

developer_response.body: Hi , it is really strange , if you don't manage to play even having tryed to reset the settings ask us for a refound. Unfortunatly we don't have this problem so we have not idea of what can be the cause

reviews.review_title: Almost impossible to play in multiplayer
reviews.review_description: Waste of $ if u want to play with a friend

developer_response.body: Hi ,it really depends on the distance between players , we are so sorry for the bad review , if you want a refound you are free to ask that

reviews.review_description: Great customer service, the physics Are on point. Would definetly recomend
When I first got this game it would freeze at the opponents end, so I deleted & re- downloaded it, it now works fine, a great game well worth the money, hours of fun, definitely recommend

developer_response.body: Than you so much man,i really appreciate it!
